pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 98: cat > "$PACKAGE_DIR/TokenManager.kt" where PACKAGE_DIR is defined at line 14 as $PROJECT_DIR/app/src/main/java/com/example/securenotes/data

Task description (line 4-5) specifies filename 'secure_app_prefs'; verifier.py line 103 checks for '"secure_app_prefs"' in content. Cross-verified with EncryptedSharedPreferences.create() documentation which accepts a fileName parameter.

Task description requires 'androidx.security:security-crypto' dependency version 1.0.0 or higher. Verified via Android Developers documentation: https://developer.android.com/reference/androidx/security/crypto/EncryptedSharedPreferences - this is the correct library for EncryptedSharedPreferences.

Task description (line 5) specifies AES256_SIV for key encryption. Verified via Android Developers documentation and multiple sources that for EncryptedSharedPreferences, the only available PrefKeyEncryptionScheme is AES256_SIV.

Task description (line 5) specifies AES256_GCM for value encryption. Verified via Android Developers documentation and multiple sources that for EncryptedSharedPreferences, the only available PrefValueEncryptionScheme is AES256_GCM.

Task description (line 3) requires creating MasterKey using MasterKey.Builder. Verified via Android Developers API reference: https://developer.android.com/reference/androidx/security/crypto/MasterKey - MasterKey.Builder is the correct class for key generation in androidx.security:security-crypto library.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves implementing Jetpack Security's EncryptedSharedPreferences in a synthetic Android project. The androidx.security:security-crypto library uses AES256_SIV exclusively for key encryption and AES256_GCM exclusively for value encryption in EncryptedSharedPreferences - these are the only available schemes per official Android Developers documentation. The MasterKey.Builder class is the correct API for key generation. The filename 'secure_app_prefs' is a valid parameter for EncryptedSharedPreferences.create(). The target project is created synthetically by setup_task.sh at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/SecureNotes with TokenManager located at app/src/main/java/com/example/securenotes/data/TokenManager.kt.
